steps.title: Find the causal clue
steps.content:
The passage says Loris Taylor wanted stations like KABU to thrive, which explains why she took the next action.
This sets up a cause‑effect relationship that the transition must show.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Therefore signals that founding Native Public Media was a result of her wish for stations to thrive.
The other three either contrast, add extra information, or rephrase, none of which show the cause‑effect link.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
